title: Fee Structure Overview (2024-25)
content: Fee structure for A.Y. 2024-25 approved on May 6, 2024. Fees payable in two equal installments: first by July 22, 2024, second by January 2, 2025.

title: SOE Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Engineering annual fees (2024-25): B.Tech CSE (Cyber Security / Software Engineering) ₹3,00,000. B.Tech Mechanical (Automobile / 3D Printing & Design) ₹2,50,000. B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science ₹3,00,000. B.Tech Biotechnology / Biomedical Engineering ₹2,50,000. B.Tech Robotics and Automation Engineering ₹2,50,000. B.Tech CSE (Virtual and Augmented Reality) ₹3,50,000. B.Tech CSE (Cyber Forensic & Info Security) ₹3,50,000. B.Tech Aeronautical / Aerospace / Avionics Engineering ₹3,00,000. Integrated B.Tech + M.Tech (Aerospace / Defence Tech) ₹3,50,000. M.Tech (Bio Engineering / AI & ML / Robotics) ₹2,30,000. M.Tech (Space Technology / Infrastructure Engineering) ₹2,50,000.

title: SOM Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Management annual fees (2024-25): BBA (Sales & Marketing, Finance, Fintech, etc.) ₹2,30,000. BBA (Business Analytics, Brand Management, etc.) ₹1,40,250. BBA Honours (International Finance & Data Analytics) ₹3,00,000. BBA Aviation ₹2,00,000. MBA (HR, Finance, Operations, Marketing, etc.) ₹3,50,000. MBA (Business Analytics, Retail Management, etc.) ₹2,38,000. MBA (Sports Management, AI & Data Science, International Business) ₹10,00,000. MBA Aviation ₹3,00,000.

title: SOD Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Design annual fees (2024-25): B.Des (UI/UX, Visual Communication, Fashion) ₹3,50,000. B.Des Transportation Design ₹5,00,000. M.Des Transportation Design ₹7,00,000. M.Des UI/UX ₹5,00,000. PG Diploma in Digital Modelling ₹2,75,000.

title: Other Schools Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: Other schools annual fees (2024-25): School of Law (BA LLB, LLB, LLM) ₹2,00,000. School of Liberal Arts (BA Liberal Arts-Hons, MA International Studies) ₹2,30,000. School of Architecture (B.Arch, M.Arch Environmental) ₹2,00,000. School of Hotel Management (B.Sc Hospitality and Hotel Administration) ₹1,75,000, M.Sc ₹2,00,000. School of Film and Media: B.Sc Sound Engineering ₹3,00,000, Film Making ₹2,00,000, Animation and Journalism ₹1,55,000. Ph.D. Programs (Engineering, Law, Management, Design) ₹2,00,000 per year.

content: Admissions hotlines: General Admissions +91-8956487911 / +91-8956487916. School of Engineering +91-8956487911 / +91-9175067360. School of Management +91-9075153542 / +91-8956487916. School of Design +91-9075153542 / +91-8956487916. School of Law +91-9175069861 / +91-9028954966. School of Hotel Management +91-7906285013. Hostel Inquiries +91-8087778799.

title: Email Directory
content: Email contacts: Central Admissions admissions@adypu.edu.in. General Info info@adypu.edu.in. Student Service Division (SSD) ssd@adypu.edu.in. Engineering specific soe.info@adypu.edu.in.

title: Office Hours
content: Office hours: Monday to Friday 9:30 AM - 5:30 PM IST. Admissions Saturday 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM IST. Admissions Sunday 9:30 AM - 5:30 PM IST.

title: Scholarships
content: ADYPU scholarships available: Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship. Pune Pride Scholarship. ADYPU Divyang Excellence Scholarship (for students with disabilities). Beti Padhao Scholarship (for female students). Khelo India Sports Delight Scholarship. ADYPU Entrance Talent Hunt Scholarship.

title: University Officials and Deans
content: ADYPU officials: Registrar: Dr. Sudhakar Shinde. Incharge Controller of Examinations: Dr. Sunil Ingole. Director School of Online and Distance Education: Dr. Kamaljeet Kaur Siddhu. Dean School of Engineering & School of Defence: Dr. Prashant Kumbharkar. Dean School of Management: Dr. Chetna Mehta. Dean School of Design: Ar. Aparna Mhetras. Dean School of Law & School of Liberal Arts: Dr. Sunny Thomas. Dean School of Science & School of Film and Media: Dr. Sushanta Das. Associate Dean School of Hospitality and Hotel Management: Dr. Atul Ramgade. Dean School of Doctoral Studies: Dr. Radhika Menon. Dean Center for Advanced Indian Science: KM Sinha. Dean School of Architecture: Prof. Rajaram Golgire. Dean Student Service Division: Dr. Vijay Kulkarni. Director IQAC: Dr. Deepa Joshi. Director SPCR: Dr. Santosh Borde. Dean Planning and Development: Dr. Sachin M. Rajas. Head of Sports: Dr. Heena Sidhu.

title: About ADYPU
content: Ajeenkya DY Patil University (ADYPU) is an innovation-focused institution in Pune offering undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs. Academic schools: Engineering, Management, Design, Hotel Management, Law, Liberal Arts, Architecture, Film and Media, Science, Allied Health Sciences, Online and Distance Education. Key features: T-Shaped Professional curriculum combining specialized expertise with interdisciplinary knowledge. Global partnerships with universities in the US, UK, and Europe for immersion programs. Innovation centers: DRIF (Design, Research and Innovation Foundation) and Entrepreneurship and Innovation Centre.

title: Campus Events
content: ADYPU campus events: Alchemy (annual School of Design event). #TECH (fusion of technology, sports, and cultural competitions). Impetus (large-scale annual sports event). Ablaze (cultural spectacle featuring dance, music, and fashion). Y20 Festival (prestigious youth-led innovation event hosted by the university).

title: Recent Highlights (2025-2026)
content: ADYPU recent highlights: Ph.D. Admissions Open 2026. 10th Convocation celebrated in December 2025. School of Management recognized in Times B-School Survey 2026. International engagements including with the Vice President of Guyana.

title: SOE Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Engineering B.Tech specializations: CSE (Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Software Engineering, Fintech, Virtual and Augmented Reality, Cyber Forensic & Information Security). Information Technology (Mobile Application & Information Security, Cloud Technology, Information Security, Computer Science & Technology AI and Digital Systems). Biotechnology (Medical Biotechnology, Food Technology, Bioinformatics). Mechanical Engineering (Automobile Engineering, 3D Printing and Design). Other B.Tech: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Biomedical Engineering, Robotics and Automation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Avionics Engineering, Smart and Sustainable Energy, Electronics and Computer Engineering. BCA (Hons) specializations: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Blockchain and Distributed Computing, Data Analytics and Business Intelligence, Information Technology (Cyber Security / Cloud Computing / Media), Full Stack Development, Web App Development, Game Development, Internet of Things.

title: SOE Admissions
content: School of Engineering admission process: ADYPU Common Entrance Test (ACET) followed by counseling session and personal interview. Scholarships available: Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship, Pune Pride Scholarship, and various excellence and sports-based awards.

title: SOM Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Management BBA specializations: Business & Strategy (Entrepreneurship and Innovation, International Business, Business Analytics, Business and Process Excellence). Finance (Financial Management and Corporate Strategies, Finance, Financial Markets, Fintech, Fintech and Digital Banking, Banking and Financial Services). Marketing & Sales (Sales and Marketing, Integrated Marketing and Communications, Brand Management, Online Media and e-Marketing). Operations & Services (Logistics and Supply Chain Management, e-Commerce and Logistics, Retail Management, Aviation, Sports Management). Advanced Studies (Decision Sciences). Additional degrees: BBA Honours (International Business, Banking and Financial Services, Digital Marketing). BBA in International Finance. iB.Com (International Accounting).

title: SOM Placements and Admissions
content: School of Management placement stats: Highest package ₹9 LPA, average package ₹5.5 LPA. Admission process: Register for ADYPU Common Entrance Test (ACET), followed by counseling session and personal interview. 11 scholarship categories available including Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship.
